creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! I have tweaked it a bit. 

-#include <tracker.h> 
+#include "../libtracker/tracker.h" 

This isn't a correct solution. I have created a correct solution in 
patch-src_libtracker-gtk_Makefile.in. Also, I have added INSTALLS_ICONS=yes 
as I believe that portlint will warning about it. 

As for the patch-src_sqlite3_os_unix.c, I have created a better one in 
patch-src_sqlite3_Makefile.in.
